title: Unable to Login to Account
description: Customer reports that they cannot log in even after entering correct credentials.

title: Payment Not Reflected
description: Customer completed payment but the transaction is not showing in order history.

title: Profile Update Not Saving
description: Changes made to the profile information are not being saved properly.

title: App Freezes on Dashboard
description: Customer reports that the application freezes after opening the dashboard.

title: Invoice Download Error
description: Customer cannot download invoice due to server error message.

title: Email Notification Not Received
description: Customer is not receiving email notifications for important updates.

title: Subscription Renewal Issue
description: Customer's subscription was not renewed automatically despite active card details.

title: File Upload Failed
description: Customer receives an error when attempting to upload documents.

title: Two-Factor Code Not Working
description: Customer enters correct verification code but system rejects it.

title: Slow Page Loading
description: Customer experiences slow loading times across multiple pages.
